note: Quarterly extension for the Kitchin band (Roadmap #9). FRED + Eurostat across USA, EA20, JPN, GBR, CAN, DEU, FRA, ITA. JPN/GBR/CAN use OECD-source mirror series hosted on FRED — the OECD SDMX REST endpoint at sdmx.oecd.org has compound DSD references (DSD_X@DF_Y) whose structure registry returns empty payloads, making positional key construction impractical without per-dataflow hardcoding. The native OECD path remains available in ecowave/cycles/quarterly.fetch_oecd_qna for users who want to wire up custom dim mappings. EA aggregate starts 1995; all others available continuously since 1960. Used by `position-cycles --horizon quarterly`.

datasets.name: FRED (Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis)

JPN.note: Real GDP for Japan (OECD-source mirror on FRED)

GBR.note: Real GDP for UK, SA (IMF IFS mirror on FRED)

CAN.note: Real GDP for Canada, SA (IMF IFS mirror on FRED)

variable_codes.notes: Real GDP. Annualised quarterly log-difference: stationary, harmonises across providers (different reference years), and matches NBER chronology conventions.

JPN.note: Japan CPI all items (OECD mirror on FRED, monthly → Q mean)

GBR.note: UK CPI all items (OECD mirror on FRED, monthly → Q mean)

variable_codes.notes: Headline CPI. Monthly FRED series resampled to quarterly mean by the loader. Inflation cycles are a co-canonical Kitchin signal.

JPN.note: Japan harmonised UR (OECD mirror on FRED, monthly → Q mean)

GBR.note: UK harmonised UR 15-64 (OECD mirror on FRED, quarterly native)

variable_codes.notes: Total unemployment rate. Already stationary; level passes through. Primary Juglar signal, kept here for consistency with the WB Q_UEM.

USA.note: US 10-year government bond yield (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

EA.note: EA 10-year government bond yield (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

JPN.note: Japan 10-year government bond yield (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

GBR.note: UK 10-year government bond yield (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

CAN.note: Canada 10-year government bond yield (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

DEU.note: Germany 10-year government bond yield (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

FRA.note: France 10-year government bond yield (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

ITA.note: Italy 10-year government bond yield (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

variable_codes.notes: Long-term government bond yield (10-year). Stationary in level; level pass-through. Primary Kondratieff signal — long-wave price-level proxy per Korotayev & Tsirel (2010), parallels LH_YIELD in the long-history manifest.

USA.note: BIS Credit to Private Non-Financial Sector — US, all lenders, total (FRED mirror)

EA.note: BIS Credit to Private Non-Financial Sector — Euro Area, all lenders (FRED mirror)

JPN.note: BIS Credit to Private Non-Financial Sector — Japan (FRED mirror)

GBR.note: BIS Credit to Private Non-Financial Sector — UK (FRED mirror)

CAN.note: BIS Credit to Private Non-Financial Sector — Canada (FRED mirror)

DEU.note: BIS Credit to Private Non-Financial Sector — Germany (FRED mirror)

FRA.note: BIS Credit to Private Non-Financial Sector — France (FRED mirror)

ITA.note: BIS Credit to Private Non-Financial Sector — Italy (FRED mirror)

variable_codes.notes: Total credit to private non-financial sector (BIS, all lenders). Annualised quarterly log-growth. Borio-Drehmann financial cycle (Juglar/Kuznets) and Reinhart-Rogoff credit super-cycle (Kondratieff). Parallels LH_CREDIT in the long-history manifest.

USA.note: Gross fixed capital formation, volume index, SA — US (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

EA.note: Gross fixed capital formation — Euro Area (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

GBR.note: Gross fixed capital formation — UK (OECD MEI mirror on FRED)

variable_codes.notes: Real gross fixed capital formation (volume, SA). Schumpeter (1939) — Juglar as investment cycle. Annualised quarterly log-growth. Parallels CY_INV in the WB manifest. JPN/CAN not mirrored on FRED with the OECD MEI NAEXKP04 code; they would need a separate OECD SDMX wiring in a follow-up.

USA.note: BIS Real Residential Property Prices — US (FRED mirror)

EA.note: BIS Real Residential Property Prices — Euro Area (FRED mirror)

JPN.note: BIS Real Residential Property Prices — Japan (FRED mirror)

GBR.note: BIS Real Residential Property Prices — UK (FRED mirror)

CAN.note: BIS Real Residential Property Prices — Canada (FRED mirror)

DEU.note: BIS Real Residential Property Prices — Germany (FRED mirror)

FRA.note: BIS Real Residential Property Prices — France (FRED mirror)

ITA.note: BIS Real Residential Property Prices — Italy (FRED mirror)

variable_codes.notes: BIS real residential property price index (deflated by CPI). Lewis-Kuznets construction swing — house prices are the canonical Kuznets driver. Annualised quarterly log-growth. Parallels LH_HPI in the long-history manifest.
